Interface BulkOperation.Replace

All Superinterfaces:
BulkOperation
Enclosing interface:
BulkOperation
public static interface BulkOperation.Replace extends BulkOperation
Replace operation: replace the document matching the query() with the replacement() document.
Since:
5.1
Author:
Christoph Strobl

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface BulkOperation

    BulkOperation.Insert, BulkOperation.Remove, BulkOperation.RemoveFirst, BulkOperation.Replace, BulkOperation.Update, BulkOperation.UpdateFirst

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Query
    query()
    Returns the query that selects the document to replace.
    Object
    replacement()
    Returns the replacement document.
    boolean
    upsert()
    Returns whether to perform an upsert if no document matches.

    Methods inherited from interface BulkOperation

    context

  • Method Details

      Returns the query that selects the document to replace.

      the query.

    • replacement

      Object replacement()
      Returns the replacement document.
      Returns:

      boolean upsert()
      Returns whether to perform an upsert if no document matches.
      Returns:
      true for upsert.
